title: sambucus microbotrys xanthocarpa
intro: Sambucus microbotrys xanthocarpa, also known as elderberry, is a shrub or small tree that belongs to the Adoxaceae family. The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties, due to the presence of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Sambucus microbotrys xanthocarpa include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce the severity of cold and flu symptoms, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Sambucus microbotrys xanthocarpa include elderberry syrup, capsules, and tea, which can be used to prevent and treat various health conditions.
